title: Andrew James Defrost Tray Thaw Board Plate | Up to 5 Times Faster Defrosting for Meat and Frozen Foods | No Electricity Required (with Drip Tray)
features: DEFROST FOOD QUICKER -- Defrost food up to 5 times faster with the Andrew James Defrost Tray. This meat thawing tray saves you time while ensuring that your meat is safely defrosted, ready to cook and eat.

QUICK DEFROSTING TRAY -- This handy quick defrosting tray lets you defrost food both quickly and safely. There isn’t any need for a microwave or oven with this thawing board, so there isn’t a risk of partially cooking food while you are defrosting it. You can keep a close eye on the quick defrosting tray too, so your meat doesn’t sit out longer than necessary.

DEFROST TRAY WITH DETACHABLE DRIP TRAY – This quick defrost tray comes with a detachable drip tray, ensuring any moisture formed during the defrosting process is captured and easily disposed of. The drip tray of the Andrew James defrosting tray is easily removed for cleaning and storage.

ELEGANT THAWING TRAY -- This defrost tray design features grooves to help liquid from frozen food to be drained away. Simply place the drip tray underneath the defrosting tray to catch any unwanted liquids. The non-stick surface of this thawing tray is very easily cleaned and is also dishwasher safe.
MANUFACTURER’S WARRANTY -- Shop with confidence. Your andrew james quick defrost thawing tray and all kitchen gadgets are covered by a manufacturer’s
description: Product Description Defrost Tray with Detachable Drip Tray Defrost your food in rapid time with your Andrew James Defrost Tray with Drip Tray. You don’t need any chemicals, electricity, or your microwave, as this handy tray uses the superior heat-conductivity of aluminium to warm up frozen foods more quickly at room temperature than just placing onto a plate or mat in the kitchen. Depending on the food and its thickness, it may take as little as 20 minutes to defrost. A key feature is the detachable drip tray, which conveniently catches any drops of moisture which may form during the deforsting process. The drip tray easily detaches for cleaning and emptying, so it is both convenient and hygienic. Without the use of chemicals, electricity, or heat, your Andrew James Defrost Tray boasts a natural thawing process when defrosting meat or other foods. There is no loss of nutrients and your food will maintain its original flavour. You can fit 2 standard-sized chicken breasts onto the tray. The thickness of the food may affect the defrost time. Special Features Defrost Naturally - No Electricity You can defrost food quickly and safely without using a microwave with your handy Andrew James Defrost Tray. A microwave can partially cook your food during defrosting so your aluminium tray eliminates this issue. Detachable Drip Tray A great feature of this product is the Detachable Drip Tray. This means you can easily catch and remove any drops of moisture which may form during the defrosting process, and means you don't need to use kitchen roll or a towel to absorb the moisture. Draining Channels & Dishwasher Safe With imprinted grooves that allow liquid and juices from meat and veg to be drained away, the Andrew James Defrost Tray is a kitchen essential that is also easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Defrost Any Food Chicken, fish, mince, steak, sausages, chops, vegetables, fruit, desserts, pre-made meals. Heat Conductive Design Made from a conductive metal that absorbs the natural heat in the room, this heat is then released into your food to quicken the defrosting process. Due to this impressive conductive metal, the plate brings your food to room temperature much more quickly than just placing your food on a plate in the kitchen. Can it be placed in the fridge? Yes, however cooling the tray will have the opposite effect on the task it is made for. The material used takes the heat from the room and use it to defrost the frozen item. Cooling the tray will slow this process.
